data: {"generalSituation":"With the trough of low pressure affecting Guangdong weakening gradually, the weather will be brighter over the region tomorrow. It will be hot during the day. An easterly airstream will bring one or two rain patches to the coast of Guangdong on Wednesday. An anticyclone aloft is expected to cover the coast of southern China and the northern part of the South China Sea in the latter part of this week to early next week. The weather will improve over the region. Meanwhile, under the influence of a southerly airstream, it will be hot during the day over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260407","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"South force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with one or two showers.
